settings.title: Settings
settings.profileNote: Shown in the UI. Stored locally only.
settings.apiKeyNote: API Keys are stored locally and never sent to any server.
settings.compatApiDesc: Supports OpenRouter, Qwen, DeepSeek, and other OpenAI-compatible services
settings.localModelsDesc: Open-source models running locally. No API key needed, fully offline.
settings.noModels: No chat models found. Make sure Ollama is running and has models installed.
settings.braveDesc: Used for real-time web search in MCP tools.
settings.skillHubDesc: Public skills are free without a key. Enterprise key unlocks private skill libraries.
settings.corsDesc: The request was blocked by the server. Check the API URL or set up a local proxy.

overview.lateNightHint: Late-night clarity — anything to sort out?
overview.morningHint: New day. What's the one most important thing today?
overview.forenoonHint: Any task in progress that needs an AI boost?
overview.afternoonHint: Need to clarify your thinking, organize content, or make a decision?
overview.eveningHint: Day's winding down. Use Daily Assistant to review and plan tomorrow.
overview.emptyDesc1: Projects work well for goals that need multiple conversations to build context.
overview.emptyDesc2: Not sure what to work on? Let AI help you plan your day.

templates.competitive-analysis_desc: Systematically analyze competitor positioning, feature gaps, and differentiation opportunities
templates.decision-framework_desc: RICE/ICE framework to evaluate options, identify hidden assumptions and risks
templates.user-research_desc: Design interview guides, analyze feedback, and distill core pain points
templates.pm-assistant_desc: Clarify requirements, break down features, prioritize, and output PRD essentials
templates.project-retro_desc: Guide a Retrospective, extract lessons learned, and define action items
templates.knowledge-extractor_desc: Actively extract reusable methodologies and conclusions from conversation history

chat.startHint: Type a message, AI will help you think and organize

brief.title: ContextOS · Project Brief
brief.reviewPrompt: Help me do a project review, summarizing progress, outcomes, and next steps.

skills.installNote: Skills work via AI prompts and take effect immediately
skills.noInstalledDesc: Browse the skill market to find and install skills. After installing, activate them in the skill bar at the top of any project chat.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by name or description…
skills.installedNote: Activate this skill in the skill bar at the top of a project chat
skills.installedTabNote: {{count}} skills installed · Activate in the skill bar at the top of project chats

decompose.title: Decompose Goal
decompose.subtitle: Describe your big goal and AI will break it into actionable sub-projects
decompose.placeholder: Describe your big goal, e.g.: Build an AI writing tool…
decompose.inputPlaceholder: E.g.: I want a side project — a budgeting app with income/expense tracking, reports, and multi-account support…
decompose.retryTip: AI returned an unexpected format, please retry with a different description
decompose.apiKeyError: API Key is invalid. Please configure it in Settings.
decompose.networkError: Request failed. Check your network and API Key.

inputBar.slashProjectDesc: Upgrade conversation to a formal project
inputBar.placeholder: Type a message, or / for quick commands…
inputBar.mindmapPrompt: Help me generate a mind map to organize the structure of the above content.
inputBar.mindmapStart: Help me generate a mind map:
inputBar.flowchartPrompt: Help me generate a flowchart to describe the flow of the above content.
inputBar.hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · / for commands

createProject.title: Create Project
createProject.aiGenerated: AI has auto-generated the project name and summary from the conversation. You can edit them directly.
createProject.summaryPlaceholder: Briefly describe the project's goal and background…

filePanel.title: Project Files
filePanel.noSummary: No summary yet. Keep chatting and AI will auto-generate one.
filePanel.consolidateTooltip: AI merges duplicates and compresses the knowledge base
filePanel.noKnowledge: No knowledge accumulated yet. Keep chatting and AI will auto-extract reusable insights here.
filePanel.addKnowledgePlaceholder: Enter knowledge or conclusion to record…
filePanel.memoryPlaceholder:
- Record important info in bullet format
- E.g.: User prefers TypeScript
- E.g.: Confirmed using React Router
filePanel.noMemory:
No memory entries yet.

Click here to manually add, or click "Reflect Now" to auto-extract from conversation.

artifact.scrollHint: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan
artifact.emptyDoc: Empty document. Click edit to add content.
artifact.aiEditHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline · Esc to cancel
artifact.aiModifyRequest:
Help me modify "{{title}}" ({{type}}): {{desc}}{{codeBlock}}

Please output the complete modified content as a new {{type}} artifact.
artifact.mindmapPlaceholder:
# Topic
## Branch 1
### Item A
### Item B
## Branch 2
### Item C
artifact.flowchartPlaceholder:
graph TD
  A[Start] --> B{Decision}
  B -->|Yes| C[Process]
  B -->|No| D[End]
artifact.documentPlaceholder:
# Title

Body paragraph…

## Section

- List item
artifact.aiEditPlaceholder:
Describe the changes you want to make to this {{type}}…
E.g.: change the flowchart to left-to-right layout; add a "Risk" branch to the mind map

search.hint: Enter keywords to search project names and conversation content

mcp.pageDesc: Connect external tools and let AI truly help you get things done
mcp.agentTemplatesDesc: Pre-configured AI agents — install skills and tools with one click, and create a dedicated project.
mcp.keyOptionalDesc: API Key is optional. You can connect without it, but you'll be rate-limited (60 requests/hour). Providing a key gives higher quotas. Key is stored locally only.
mcp.keyRequiredDesc: An API Key is required to access real data. The key is stored only on your local device and never uploaded to any server.
mcp.braveKeyHint2: to register for free — 2,000 free queries per month.
mcp.githubKeyHint: Go to GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens. Read-only permissions are sufficient.
mcp.guideDescPart1: This tool requires a corresponding service running in the background on your computer.
mcp.guideNextVersion: The next version will support launching local tools directly from ContextOS without manual installation or configuration. Watch for updates, or click "View Docs" to learn more.
